channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Trump Delivers Key Speech on Policy Issues
item.description: The original title, 'Trump Speech,' refers to a public address by former U.S. President Donald Trump on various policy matters. While the specific content of the speech is not detailed in the provided...

item.title: Nigeria Calls for Immediate Investigation Into Killings of Three Nigerians in South Africa
item.description: The Federal Government of Nigeria has strongly condemned the killing of Nigerian nationals in South Africa and has called on the South African authorities to carry out an urgent and transparent invest...

item.title: White House Trolls Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's Wedding with Edited Sign
item.description: The White House has sparked controversy by mocking Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding celebration at Madison Square Garden. The couple, who announced their engagement in August 2025, married on J...

item.title: Iran's Supreme Leader Khamenei's Funeral: Sons and Political Implications
item.description: The article details the public funeral of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, Iran's late Supreme Leader, highlighting the attendance of three of his sons—Mostafa, Masoud, and Meysam—who played significant roles ...

item.title: Zambian President Lungu's Burial Dispute Intensifies Ahead of Elections
item.description: The legal battle over the burial arrangements of late Zambian President Lungu has escalated into a politically charged issue ahead of upcoming elections. His remains, held in a South African mortuary ...

item.title: Study Links Lung Health to Leafy Greens Consumption
item.description: The article discusses a study published in July 2026 that links lung health to the consumption of leafy green vegetables. Researchers found that individuals who regularly eat leafy greens like spinach...

item.title: DA criticises Cogta's vehicle distribution to traditional leaders as politically motivated
item.description: The Democratic Alliance (DA) in KwaZulu-Natal has condemned the Department of Cooperative Governance and Traditional Affairs (Cogta) for distributing 35 government-funded vehicles to traditional leade...

item.title: Ganga Expressway Link Road Damaged in Uttar Pradesh After Two Months of Use
item.description: A seven-metre approach road connecting the Ganga Expressway with the Sonic toll plaza in Unnao suffered significant damage during the first heavy rain two months after its inauguration. The road near ...

item.title: Tanzania's TPDF Commits to Maintaining National Stability
item.description: The Tanzania People’s Defence Force (TPDF) has issued a public statement reaffirming national security stability amid growing concerns over misinformation campaigns targeting Tanzania’s peace. Lieuten...

item.title: Philippines and Canada Strengthen Economic Ties with $2.5B Investment Commitments

item.title: Zendaya Wins Best Actress at 2023 Golden Globes for 'The Power of the Dog'
item.description: Zendaya, 27, has been awarded the Best Actress title at the 2023 Golden Globes for her role in the film 'The Power of the Dog'. The ceremony, held in a grand venue, celebrated the achievements of acto...

item.title: Nigerian Sprinter Wins 100m at Prefontaine Classic, Beats World Champ Seville
item.description: Kanyinsola Ajayi, 21-year-old Nigerian sprinter, delivered a dominant performance in the men's 100m final at the 2026 Prefontaine Classic. Clocking an impressive 9.84 seconds, he outpaced reigning wor...

item.title: PAF Officer Killed While Protecting Woman During Abduction Attempt in Islamabad
item.description: A Pakistan Air Force (PAF) officer, Group Captain Asim Tariq, was martyred after intervening to protect a woman during an abduction attempt on Islamabad's Ninth Avenue. Police reported that the incide...

item.title: Audit Reports Highlight Municipal Governance Failures and Calls for Accountability

item.title: PNP deploys over 6,000 police officers as Senate prepares for Sara Duterte impeachment trial
item.description: The Philippine National Police–National Capital Region Police Office (PNP-NCRPO) announced that more than 6,000 police officers will be deployed around the Senate on July 6 to maintain peace and order...

item.title: Pakistan military honors Karnal Sher Khan on 27th martyrdom anniversary
item.description: The Pakistan military paid tribute to Captain Karnal Sher Khan Shaheed, a celebrated hero of the 1999 Kargil conflict, on the 27th anniversary of his martyrdom. The Inter-Service Public Relations (ISP...

item.title: Young Man with Severe Epilepsy Faces Family Struggles

item.title: Ezra Klein argues Obama's contrast to Trump could shape future elections
item.description: In a column published on July 5, 2026, Ezra Klein, a New York Times columnist, argues that Barack Obama remains the only viable candidate capable of challenging Donald Trump's political dominance. Kle...

item.title: News Corp Australia blocks crawler bots with technical access issues
item.description: The article explains that News Corp Australia has implemented software to manage crawler bot traffic on its websites. Users experiencing access restrictions are advised to temporarily disable ad block...

item.title: Cape Town City secures experienced midfielder Thabang Monare for 2026/27 season
